diff: 100V input COT buck converter, 0.5A output (vs 1A on LM5164), same ultra-low IQ.
100V input COT buck converter, 1A output, AEC-Q100 Grade 1 automotive (Tj -40 to +150C).

100V input COT buck converter, 0.5A output, AEC-Q100 automotive extended high-temperature (165C junction) grade.
60V eFuse with fixed 38V internal overvoltage clamp (vs TPS26600's adjustable overvoltage cut-off); circuit-breaker with auto-retry.
eFuse 2.7-18V, 0.5-4A adj current limit, 34mOhm; fixed 5.7V OV clamp, auto-retry, active-low EN/OVLO, no QOD.
